---
title: "nimble_playground"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    df-print: kable
execute:
  messages: false
  warnings: false
---

## Setup environment

```{r}
#| output: false
library(tidyverse)
library(nimble)
library(posterior)
library(bayesplot)

set.seed(123)

theme_set(theme_minimal())
```

## The full Monty

```{r}
M <- 1000

code <- nimbleCode({
  for (m in 1:M) {
    car[m]  ~ dcat(pdoor[1:3])
    pick[m] ~ dcat(pdoor[1:3])

    keep_win[m]   <- equals(car[m], pick[m])
    switch_win[m] <- 1 - keep_win[m]
  }

  for (d in 1:3) {
    pdoor[d] <- 1 / 3
  }
})

model <- nimbleModel(code, constants = list(M = M))

## Simulate the stochastic nodes
model$simulate(c("car", "pick"))

## Recalculate deterministic nodes
model$calculate(c("keep_win", "switch_win"))

sum(model$keep_win)
sum(model$switch_win)
```
